Cookie Clicker

Welcome to Cookie Clicker! Your goal is to bake as many cookies as possible. Click the giant cookie to earn cookies manually, then spend your cookies to purchase buildings that automatically generate cookies for you. Each building type produces cookies at different rates. Unlock upgrades to boost your production and reach higher cookie counts. Can you reach 10,000 cookies to achieve ultimate victory?

Controls: SPACE: Click cookie | Arrow UP/DOWN: Navigate menu | Z: Purchase | SHIFT: Toggle tabs | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
